title: Create Lamps
description: This create mod adds 8 new quartz lamps for decoration purposes
body:
Create lamps adds 8 new quartz lamps

to craft you will need Zinc ingots + Quartz + Ore to color it, after that you need to combine Gravel + Paper and combine with the colored quartz in the crafting grid
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/120168a341cf5a55a622222350658f7d55ae2a3e_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/181c3f3eb2856d19458282de7b7e5d1a2c3c76f2.png)

New lamps:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92eb93cab661e04d95fa52c35494959733842422_0.webp)

-> Green quartz lamp

-> Cyan quartz lamp

-> Blue quartz lamp

-> Gray quartz lamp

-> Purple quartz lamp

-> White quartz lamp

-> Yellow quartz lamp

-> Orange quartz lamp

Ps: the lamps don't have the same redstone behavior as the rose quartz from the Create mod, it's just for decoration and illumination.

!!! this mod is still in beta and can contain some bugs!!!!
if you find some bugs or new ideas to add to the mod you can contact me on Discord: Kuuhaku.02
